_meta.scope: GFI token yield layer. Native GFI token yield remains null because no official staking, coupon, dividend, or token-native yield mechanism was verified in this pass.

goldfinchPrime.yieldDescription: Official Goldfinch Prime FAQ describes private-credit returns as coming from interest paid by underlying private-credit funds, less product-level fees. This is product-level yield context and should not be treated as native GFI token yield.
goldfinchPrime.feeContext: Official FAQ references a 0.5% annual management fee and a 0.5% withdrawal fee for Goldfinch Prime. These are not native GFI token fees.
goldfinchPrime.redemptionDistributionContext: Official FAQ references quarterly withdrawal processing for Goldfinch Prime, subject to available liquidity and portfolio mechanics.

defillamaProtocol.notes: DeFiLlama includes protocol-level APY/yield context, but this may represent pool or product yield rather than GFI token yield. Do not import into currentYield unless Nexus defines this asset as a product/pool rather than GFI token.

_meta.classificationDecision: Keep yield fields null for goldfinch-gfi. If Nexus later creates goldfinch-prime or individual Goldfinch pool assets, use product/pool yield data in those separate entries.
dataGaps: No official native GFI staking yield verified.
No official GFI coupon, dividend, rebasing, or redemption-yield mechanism verified.
Goldfinch Prime yield needs separate product-level modeling if added as a distinct Nexus RWA asset.
